apply: Students will be able to apply the principles of the Constitution to real-life scenarios.
Students will be able to use the Constitution to evaluate the actions of the government.
Students will be able to argue in favor or against a particular amendment to the Constitution.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the impact of the Constitution on Indian society.
Students will be able to evaluate the effectiveness of the Constitution in promoting social justice.
Students will be able to compare the Indian Constitution with other constitutions of the world.
remember: Students will be able to recall the key features of the Indian Constitution.
Students will be able to identify the principles of the Constitution.
Students will be able to list the amendments made to the Constitution.
understand: Students will be able to explain the concept of a living document and its relevance to the Indian Constitution.
Students will be able to describe the evolution of the Constitution and its development over time.
Students will be able to analyze the role of judges in interpreting the Constitution.

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT objective 1: To understand the concept of a living document and its relevance to the Indian Constitution.
To describe the evolution of the Constitution and its development over time.
To analyze the role of judges in interpreting the Constitution.
board_exam_objectives: To explain the key features of the Indian Constitution.
To describe the principles of the Constitution and its amendments.
To evaluate the impact of the Constitution on Indian society.
